description:
Verso (original use): Note from Shelomo b. Eliyyahu (he signs Barakāt Ibn al-Dayyān) to al-shaykh al-rashīd Abū l-Faḍl. In Arabic script, with the last line in Hebrew. Dating: early 13th century. He very politely asks the addressee to fulfill his promise and provide 'the list of the wheat' (qāʾimat al-qamḥ).

Recto (secondary use): Account in Judaeo-Arabic and Greek/Coptic numerals organized by the parshiyot. Sitt Kāfūr is named. This may be the 'wheat list' requested in the letter on verso.
